message:
fix(s3fifo): preserve frequency count when promoting entries to main queue

When an entry in the small FIFO has freq >= 1 and gets promoted to the
main queue, reset its frequency to freq-1 instead of unconditionally
zeroing it. This preserves the access history accumulated in the small
queue, preventing hot entries from being immediately evictable after
promotion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
